positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and ancient, gnarled roots intertwined with elegant, minimalist geometric floral patterns. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, focusing on a central cluster of glowing flora. Use a clean silhouette aesthetic with bold, single-line ink drawing techniques combined with soft gradients of deep teal, emerald green, and pale gold. The lighting should be dramatic backlighting from the bioluminescent sources, creating deep shadows and high contrast. Perfect for a modern, apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, signature, logo, copyright, messy, cluttered, photorealistic, ugly
